DEPENDENCY DIRECTION: modules → shared → infrastructure → config

Cart state, checkout flow, order confirmation

core/ → api/ · Axios Base Instance · Interceptors · Auth Token Injection

DEPENDENCY DIRECTION: app → features → shared → core/api → Backend
